definition:
ἀγορά, -ας, ἡ (ἀγείρω, to bring together) 
 [in LXX for עִזָּבוֹן, שׁוּק ;] 
   1. an assembly (Hom., Xen., al.).
   2. a place of assembly, a public place or forum, a market-place (Hom., Thuc, al.; LXX): Mat.11:16 20:2 23:7, Mrk.6:56 (cf . MM, VGT, see word, ἀγυιά) 7:4 (Bl., §46, 7) 12:38, Luk.7:32 (Bl., l.with) 11:43 20:46, Act.16:19 17:7 (Cremer, 59; MM, VGT, see word).
 † (AS)
